app.name: Music to MIDI
app.subtitle: Intelligently convert music to MIDI files

dropzone.title: Drop audio file here, or click to select
dropzone.subtitle: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A

mode.label: Processing Mode
mode.smart_tooltip: Direct multi-instrument transcription of full audio, recognizes 128 GM instruments, no source separation needed
mode.vocal_split_tooltip: Separate vocals and accompaniment with BS-RoFormer, then transcribe both with YourMT3+; outputs two MIDI files by default, with optional merged MIDI
mode.smart_hint:
Transcribe full audio directly, recognizes 128 GM instruments.
Track count is determined automatically by the model.
mode.vocal_split_desc: 🎤  BS-RoFormer + YourMT3+  —  Vocal Split + Separate Transcription
mode.vocal_split_hint:
Separate vocals and accompaniment with BS-RoFormer, then transcribe both
with YourMT3+ independently. Outputs two MIDI files by default; optionally add one merged MIDI.
mode.six_stem_split_tooltip: Split bass/drums/guitar/piano/vocals/other with BS Roformer SW, then transcribe each with YourMT3+; defaults to 6 stem MIDIs and supports selected-stems-only mode
mode.six_stem_split_desc: 🎚️  BS Roformer SW + YourMT3+  —  Six-Stem Split + Separate Transcription
mode.six_stem_split_hint: By default all six stems are transcribed (plus 1 merged MIDI). You can enable selected-stems-only mode to transcribe a subset.
mode.piano_transkun_tooltip: Use the Transkun piano-specialized model for event-level piano transcription.
mode.piano_transkun_hint: Best for solo piano input. Current packaged checkpoint focuses on note events, not full pedal reconstruction.
mode.piano_aria_amt_tooltip: Use Aria-AMT piano-specialized model for high-precision piano transcription.
mode.piano_aria_amt_hint: Best for solo-piano input; outputs one dedicated piano MIDI.
mode.six_stem_vocal_harmony: Split vocals into lead + harmony (experimental proxy)

engine.label: Preferred Engine
engine.aria_amt_tooltip: Recommended piano-specialized backend. In six-stem mode it is applied to the separated piano stem; full multi-instrument coverage still uses the selected multi-instrument backend.
engine.aria_amt_general_hint: Recommended: Aria-AMT stays preferred for piano-focused quality, while full multi-instrument passes use the selected multi-instrument backend.
engine.aria_amt_six_stem_hint: Recommended: six-stem mode still runs one multi-instrument full-mix pass, then uses Aria-AMT on the separated piano stem when available.
engine.aria_amt_with_miros_hint: Aria-AMT is preferred for piano, while MIROS remains the active full-mix multi-instrument backend.
engine.yourmt3_tooltip: Default full multi-instrument backend based on YourMT3+ MoE.
engine.yourmt3_general_hint: Use YourMT3+ MoE for the full multi-instrument pass.
engine.yourmt3_six_stem_hint: Six-stem mode runs one YourMT3+ full-mix pass, then repartitions the result into stem MIDIs.
engine.miros_tooltip: 2025 AMT Challenge winner. Requires a local ai4m-miros checkout and its runtime dependencies.
engine.miros_general_hint: Use MIROS for the full multi-instrument pass.
engine.miros_six_stem_hint: Six-stem mode runs one MIROS full-mix pass, then repartitions the result into stem MIDIs.
engine.dedicated_mode_hint: Dedicated piano mode ignores the general multi-instrument backend selector.
engine.quality_configurable_hint: Quality selector applies to the YourMT3+ full-mix pass and supports fast / balanced / best.
engine.quality_partial_hint: Quality selector only affects the YourMT3+ full-mix pass; Aria-AMT keeps its fixed checkpoint quality for the piano stem.
engine.quality_fixed_hint: This path uses a fixed checkpoint quality; fast / balanced / best does not change backend inference.

about.title: About Music to MIDI
about.description: Convert audio to multi-track MIDI files
about.author: Author
